CustomField.label: Actual Percent
CustomField.description: Actual percentage achieved (0-100) for cells in a Percent-mode category, entered in the Universal Budget grid's reporting mode. No standard actual-percent field exists on BudgetCategoryValue, so this custom field mirrors ActualAmount/ActualQuantity for Percent-mode rows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Actual percentage achieved this period (0-100). Reporting mode edits this value and computes variance against the budgeted percent.
